checkuser-summary:
Qalabkani waxa uu baaraa isbeddellada dhow si uu u soo saaro ciwaannada IP ee uu isticmaalay isticmaale ama u muujiyo xogta wax-ka-beddelka/isticmaalaha ee ciwaan IP ah.
Isticmaalayaasha iyo wax-ka-beddellada ka yimaadda ciwaan IP macmiil waxaa lagu heli karaa XFF headers adigoo ku daraya ciwaanka IP-ga "/xff". IPv4 (CIDR $1-32) iyo IPv6 (CIDR $2-128) waa la taageeraa.
Lama soo celin karo wax ka badan $3 wax-ka-beddel sababo la xiriira waxqabad.
U isticmaal si waafaqsan siyaasadda.
checkuser-desc: Waxay siisaa isticmaalayaasha haysta oggolaanshaha ku habboon awood ay ku hubiyaan ciwaannada IP ee isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale.
group-temporary-account-viewer: Daawadayaasha IP-yada xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
right-checkuser: Hubi ciwaannada IP-ga isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale
right-checkuser-temporary-account: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah
right-checkuser-temporary-account-no-pre: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah adigoon shidin doorashada
right-checkuser-temporary-account-log: Eeg diiwaanka gelitaanka ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
right-checkuser-temporary-account-auto-r: Si otomaatig ah u muuji cinwaannada IP-ga ee ay isticmaalaan akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah
right-checkuser-suggested-investigations: Ka shaqee CheckUser [[Special:SuggestedInvestigations|baaritaannada la soo jeediyay]]
grant-checkuser-temporary-account: Hel xogta CheckUser ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
action-checkuser: Hubi ciwaannada IP-ga isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale
action-checkuser-temporary-account: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah
action-checkuser-temporary-account-no-pr: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay isticmaaleen xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah
action-checkuser-temporary-account-log: Eeg diiwaanka gelitaanka ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah
action-checkuser-temporary-account-auto-: Si otomaatig ah u muuji cinwaannada IP-ga ee ay isticmaalaan akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah
action-checkuser-suggested-investigation: Ka shaqee baaritaannada la soo jeediyay ee CheckUser
checkuser-cidr-label: Raadi xadka guud iyo ciwaannada IP ee saameeyay liiska ciwaannada IP
checkuser-cidr-no-script-message: Qalabkani wuxuu u baahan yahay JavaScript inuu shaqeeyo. Fadlan dhaqaaji JavaScript si aad u isticmaasho qalabkan.
checkuser-cidr-mixed-address-families: Lama xisaabin karo xadka wadaag ah: liisku wuxuu ka kooban yahay cinwaanno IPv4 iyo IPv6 ah labadaba.
checkuser-cidr-too-small: Xadku waa aad u weyn yahay
checkuser-range-outside-limit: Xadka $1 wuu ka baxsan yahay xadka la oggol yahay.
checkuser-empty: Diiwaanku wax walxo ah kuma jiro.
checkuser-nomatch-edits: Wax is waafaqa lama helin. Wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay wuxuu ahaa $1 at $2.
checkuser-ip-results-suggestedinvestigat: Waxaa jira xaalado Baadhitaanno la soo jeediyey oo loogu talagalay qaar ka mid ah natiijooyinka raadintaada. $1
checkuser-massblock-text-without-local-b: Ma lihid oggolaanshaha loo baahan yahay si aad u xannibto isticmaaleyaasha wiki-kan. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, weli waxaad isticmaali kartaa sanduuqyada calaamadaynta ee natiijooyinka kore si aad u doorato xisaabo iyo IP-yada aad rabto in aad qufulto ama si caalami ah u xannibto (iyadoo ku xiran gelitaankaaga).
checkuser-massblock-text: Isticmaal sanduuqyada calaamadaynta ee natiijooyinka kore si aad u doorato akoonnada iyo IP-yada aad rabto inaad xanibto. Kadib waxaad isticmaali kartaa badhamada hoose, kuwaas oo furi doona foomka {{#special:InvestigateBlock}} iyadoo bartilmaameedyada si hore loo buuxiyay.
checkuser-massblock-commit-ips: Xannib ciwaannada IP ee la xulay
checkuser-massglobalblock-commit-account: Si caalami ah u xannib xisaabaadka la xulay
checkuser-massglobalblock-commit-ips: Si caalami ah u xannib ciwaannada IP ee la xulay
checkuser-massblock-localblocks-section: Si deegaanka u xannib bartilmaameedyada la xulay
checkuser-massblock-globalblocks-section: Si caalami ah u xanib bartilmaameedyada la doortay
checkuser-block-reason-dropdown:
* Sababaha caadiga ah ee xannibidda
** Isticmaalka khaldan ee xisaabo badan
** Dirista xiriirro spam ah oo loo diro bogag dibadda ah
** Burburin
checkuser-centralauth-multilock: Si badan u xannib xisaabaadka la xulay
checkuser-centralauth-multilock-list: Si badan u xannib xisaabaadka la xulay adigoo isticmaalaya xiriiriyeyaasha:
checkuser-initiator-nonexistent: Qofka bilaabay ee la cayimay ma jiro.
checkuser-search: Raadi waxyaabaha ku qoran diiwaanka hubinta isticmaalaha
checkuser-token-fail: Fadhiga wuu fashilmay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
checkuser-helper-table-collapse-by-defau: Tirada ugu yar ee safafka lagu burburinayo miiska soo koobidda {{#special:CheckUser}} marka la furo:
Isticmaal kan caadiga ah ee goobta ($1)
Mar walba burburi miiska soo koobidda marka la furo
Marna ha burburin miiska soo koobidda marka la furo
logentry-checkuser-private-event-login-s: Si guul leh {{GENDER:$2|u soo galay}} {{SITENAME}} sida $4
logentry-checkuser-private-event-login-f: {{GENDER:$2|Ku guuldarraystay}} inuu galo {{SITENAME}} sida $4 laakiin wuxuu haystay furaha sirta ah ee saxda ah
logentry-checkuser-private-event-user-lo: Si guul leh {{GENDER:$2|uga baxay}} isagoo isticmaalaya API-ga ama {{#special:logout}}
logentry-checkuser-private-event-passwor: {{GENDER:$2|diray}} iimayl dib u dejin furaha sirta ah oo loogu talagalay {{GENDER:$5|isticmaale}} $4
logentry-checkuser-private-event-autocre: si toos ah ayaa loo sameeyay
group-checkuser.css: /* Koodhka CSS ee halkan la dhigo wuxuu saameyn doonaa kaliya isticmaalayaasha CheckUser */
group-checkuser.js: /* Koodhka JavaScript ee halkan la dhigo waxaa lagu shuban doonaa kaliya isticmaalayaasha CheckUser */
checkuser-temporary-accounts-onboarding-: Soo bandhigida xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
Dhammaan ka bood
Kii hore
Xiga
Xir
Waa maxay xisaab ku meelgaar ah?

Si loo ilaaliyo asturnaanta isticmaalayaasha, {{SITENAME}} mar dambe si guud uma soo bandhigto ciwaannada IP ee tifaftirayaasha aan soo galin. Taa beddelkeeda, tifaftirayaasha aan soo gelin waxaa la siin doonaa magacyo isticmaal oo si otomaatig ah loo abuuray oo ku xiran [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Temporary_accounts xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah], waxaana ciwaannadooda IP kaliya arki kara xubnaha lagu kalsoon yahay ee bulshada ee u baahan si ay ula tacaalaan waxyeellada iyo dhaqanka xun. Marka xisaab ku-meelgaar ah loo sameeyo tifaftiraha aan soo galin, cookie ayaa lagu kaydin doonaa browser-kiisa. Xisaabtaas ku-meelgaarka ah ayaa markaas loo nisbayn doonaa dhammaan wax ka beddelada xiga, xitaa haddii ciwaanka IP-ga uu is beddelo.
Sawir muujinaya astaanta isticmaale ee xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah.
Eegista xogta IP

Qalabka [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Trust_and_Safety_Product/IP_Info Macluumaadka IP-ga] (Macluumaadka IP-ga) waxa uu u fududeeyaa maamulayaasha, la-dagaallamayaasha burburinta iyo isticmaaleyaasha khibradda leh inay helaan xogta cinwaannada IP-ga iyaga oo aan si toos ah u arkin cinwaannada IP-ga.

Isticmaaleyaasha buuxiya shuruudaha gelitaanka waxay IP Info ka hawlgelin karaan dookhyadooda. Marka la hawlgeliyo, IP Info pop-up ayaa ka soo muuqan doona agagaarka akoonnada ku-meelgaarka ah iyo cinwaannada IP-ga ee hore. Xogta IP-ga sidoo kale waxa lagu soo bandhigi doonaa bogga wax ku biirinta.
Sawir muujinaya aaladda IPInfo oo loo adeegsanayo in lagu eego xogta xisaab ku-meelgaar ah oo ku taal bog, halkaas oo astaanta macluumaadka la gujiyay si ay u soo bandhigto sanduuq soo-baxa.
Shid xogta IP
Wax baa khaldamay. Fadlan mar kale isku day. Fariinta qaladka ee la helay waxay ahayd: $1
Dookha waa la cusboonaysiiyay
Fadlan riix "$1" ka hor inta aadan sii wadin
Kaydi dooqyadaada
Kaydi dookhyada caalamiga ah
Soo bandhigidda ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah

Maamulayaasha, la dagaallamayaasha burburinta iyo isticmaaleyaasha khibradda leh hadda waxay dooran karaan inay muujiyaan cinwaannada IP-ga ee la xiriira akoon ku meelgaar ah. Marka la shido, badhanka "{{int:checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-ip-button-label}}" ayaa ka soo muuqan doona agagaarka akoonnada ku-meelgaarka ah.

{{int:checkuser-temporary-accounts-onboarding-dialog-ip-reveal-step-content-base}}

Isticmaalayaasha buuxiya shuruudaha gelitaanka waxay u baahan karaan inay shiddaan muujinta IP-ga gudaha [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal-checkuser-tempaccount|doorbidkooda]] ama [[Special:GlobalPreferences#mw-prefsection-personal-checkuser-tempaccount|doorbidka caalamiga ah]].
Waxaad maamuli kartaa awoodda aad ku arki karto ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah gudaha [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal-checkuser-tempaccount|dooqyadaada]].

Waxaad maamuli kartaa awoodda aad ku arki karto ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah gudaha [[Special:GlobalPreferences#mw-prefsection-personal-checkuser-tempaccount|dooqyadaada caalamiga ah]].

{{int:checkuser-temporary-accounts-onboarding-dialog-ip-reveal-postscript-text-with-global-preferences}} Qaabka si toos ah u muujinta IP-ga waxaa lagu maamulaa menu-ga Tools iyadoo la isticmaalayo link-ga "{{int:checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-link-sidebar}}", iyadoo leh xulashooyin waqtiyo kala duwan. Mudada caadiga ah waa $1.

Sawir muujinaya qalabka muujinta IP-ga ka dib isticmaal, halkaas oo ciwaanka IP ee la xiriira xisaabta ku-meelgaarka ah la muujiyo. Badhanka la riixay si loo arko waxa lagu calaamadeeyay qoraalka '{{int:checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-ip-button-label}}' waxaana lagu muujiyey agagaarka magaca isticmaalaha xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah.
Shid muujinta IP-ga si caalami ah
Shid muujinta IP-ga
Shid badhanka "{{int:checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-ip-button-label}}", kaas oo muujin doona ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah dhammaan wiki-yada aad ka buuxiso shuruudaha gelitaanka.

Shid qaabka "{{int:checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-link-sidebar}}", kaas oo si toos ah u muujin doona ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah. Isticmaalayaashu waa inay ka taxaddaraan inaysan si kama’ ah u shaacin ciwaannada IP-ga dadka kale.
Muujinta IP-ga waa la shiday wiki-ga hadda.
Muujinta IP-ga si caalami ah ayaa loo shiday dhammaan wiki-yada aad ka buuxiso shuruudaha gelitaanka.
checkuser-rest-access-denied: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso falkaas
checkuser-rest-access-denied-blocked-use: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso falkaas sababtoo ah xisaabtaada waa la xannibay
checkuser-rest-userinfo-user-not-found: Lambarka aqoonsiga isticmaalaha ee la bixiyay waa khalad.
checkuser-investigateblock-usertalk-labe: Ka hortag inay wax ka beddelaan boggooda hadalka inta la xannibay
checkuser-investigateblock-notice-talk-p: Ku reeb ogeysiis bogga hadalka isticmaalaha
checkuser-investigateblock-failure: Ma jiro isticmaale la xannibay. Si aad u beddesho xannibaadaha jira, hubi: "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-reblock-label}}". Xannibaad lama beddeli doono haddii xannibaadda cusub ay la mid tahay tan hore.
checkuser-investigateblock-failure-multi: Ma jiro isticmaale la xannibay. Si aad ugu darto xannibaad kale xannibaadaha jira, hubi: "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-newblock-label}}".
checkuser-investigateblock-notices-faile: Ogeysiisyo qaar laguma dari karin bogagga isticmaalaha ama bogagga hadalka isticmaalaha.
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-ips-a: Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad isla sabab isku mid ah ku xannibto labada xisaab iyo IP-yo isku mar adigoo isticmaalaya xogta CheckUser. Tani waxay jabin kartaa siyaasadda asturnaanta ee goobta. Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad sidaas sameyso?
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-confi: Haddii aad si dhab ah u hubto inaad rabto inaad sameyso, fadlan hubi "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-confirm-blocks-label}}" oo ku yaal hoosta.
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-users: Tirada isticmaalayaasha la xannibayo waxay ka badan tahay xadka $1. Kaliya {{PLURAL:$1|hal isticmaale ayaa|$1 isticmaalayaal ayaa}} lagu daray goobta isticmaalayaasha.
checkuser-investigate-legend: Raadi magacyada isticmaalayaasha, ciwaannada IP ama xadka IP
checkuser-investigate-tab-compare: Ciwaannada IP-ga & iyo xogta qalabka isticmaalaha
checkuser-investigate-preliminary-notice: Tab-ka macluumaadka xisaabtu kuma jiro wax xog ah oo ku saabsan IP-yada. Eeg [$1 tab-ka IP-yada iyo user agents] si aad u hesho faahfaahintaas.
checkuser-investigate-filters-exclude-te: Ka shaandhee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-investigate-timeline-notice-no: Natiijooyin lama helin: wax hawl ah lagama diiwaangelin isticmaalayaashan ama IP-yadan $1 maalmood ee u dambeeyay
Natiijooyin la mid ah shuruudaha shaandhaynta lama helin. Isku day in aad ka saarto qaar ka mid ah shaandhaynta si aad u ballaadhiso raadinta.
checkuser-investigate-compare-copy-messa: Ma rabtaa inaad xogtan u nuquliso sidii jadwal Wikitext ah?
checkuser-investigate-compare-notice-exc: Sababo la xiriira xaddidaado farsamo, waxaan gaarnay tirada diiwaannada la soo bandhigi karo. Xogta loo soo celiyay bartilmaameedyada soo socda ma dhammaystirna: $1. Fadlan isku day inaad isticmaasho bartilmaameedyo yar, waqti gaaban ama xad IP oo cidhiidhi ah.
checkuser-investigate-compare-notice-no-: Natiijooyin lama helin: wax ka beddel lama samayn isticmaalayaashan ama IP-yadan $1 maalmood ee u dambeeyay
Natiijooyin la mid ah shuruudaha shaandhaynta lama helin. Isku day in aad ka saarto shaandhayn si aad u ballaadhiso raadinta.
checkuser-contributions-filters-related-: Muuji wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee la xiriira

checkuser-ip-contributions-target-error-: Geli ciwaan IP ama xad IP oo sax ah
Raadintaada lama dhammaystiri karin. Fadlan geli ciwaan IP ama xad IP oo sax ah. [[Special:Contributions/$1|Ama ku raadi magaca isticmaalaha]].

checkuser-global-contributions-subtitle-: Muujinta natiijooyinka $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmo}} ee u dambeysay, dhammaan wiki-yada. Waxaa lagu xaddiday $2 {{PLURAL:$2|natiijo|natiijooyin}} wiki kasta.

Natiijooyin la jaanqaadaya weydiinta lama helin. Natiijooyinkan waxaa laga yaabaa inay dhammaystirnayn sababtoo ah waxaad u baahan tahay inaad aqbasho heshiiska ku jira [$1 dookhyadaada caalamiga ah].
checkuser-global-contributions-no-global: Natiijooyinkan waxaa laga yaabaa inay dhammaystirnayn sababtoo ah waxaad u baahan tahay inaad aqbasho heshiiska ku jira [$1 dookhyadaada caalamiga ah].
checkuser-global-contributions-api-looku: Khalad ayaa ka dhacay soo gelinta xogta qaar ka mid ah wikiyada. Natiijooyinkan ma dhammaystirna. Waxaa laga yaabaa in ay caawiso in mar kale la isku dayo.
checkuser-global-contributions-no-result: Natiijooyin la mid ah weydiinta lama helin. Isticmaalaha "$1" ma laha wax ku darsiyo muuqda.
Natiijooyin la mid ah weydiinta lama helin. Waxaad heli kartaa wax ku darsiyo haddii aad beddesho xuduudaha raadinta.

prefs-checkuser-tempaccount: Muujinta IP ee xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah

checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-blocked-mis: Waxaa lagaa hor istaagay inaad muujiso ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah sababtoo ah xannibaad saameynaysay xisaabtaada, taas oo hadda aan jirin. Fadlan dib u cusboonaysii bogga.

checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-blocked-hea: Muujinta IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah waa dansan tahay
checkuser-tempaccount-reveal-blocked-des: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku isticmaasho sifadan, sababaha soo socda awgood:

checkuser-tempaccount-specialblock-ip-ta: Eeg [[Special:IPContributions/$1|wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee ka yimid IP-kan]].
checkuser-tempaccount-specialblock-ipran: Eeg [[Special:IPContributions/$1|wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee ka yimid kala duwanaanshahan IP]].
checkuser-temporary-account-log-header:
Kani waa diiwaan ka kooban:
# Eegista ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaab ku-meelgaar ah
# Eegista xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee ku xiran ciwaan IP ama kala-duwanaansho IP
# Beddelidda heerarka gelitaanka isticmaalaha ee lagu arko ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-cha: $1 $4 gelitaanka {{GENDER:$2|isa|eedda|kooda}} ee lagu arko ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-dis: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la damiyay}} muujinta otomaatiga ah ee ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-ena: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la shiday}} muujinta otomaatiga ah ee ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ilaa $5
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-vie: $1 si caalami ah {{GENDER:$2|arkay}} xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee $3
$1 {{GENDER:$2|arkay}} xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee la xiriira $3
log-action-filter-checkuser-temporary-ac: Hel xogta IP ee xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-af-: $1 waxa uu {{GENDER:$2|awoodsiiyay|awoodsiisay|awoodsiiyay}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko xogta la ilaaliyay
$1 waxa uu {{GENDER:$2|joojiyay|joojisay|joojiyay}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko xogta la ilaaliyay
$1 waxa uu {{GENDER:$2|eegay}} xogta la ilaaliyay ee la xiriirta $3
$1 {{GENDER:$2|wuxuu arkay}} {{PLURAL:$4|doorsoome|doorsoomayaal}} la ilaaliyay oo ku xiran $3: $5
checkuser-temporary-account-autorevoke-u: si otomaatig ah ayaa looga noqday hawl la'aan awgeed
checkuser-ipinfo-global-contributions-ur: Eeg wax ku darka caalamiga ah
checkuser-userinfocard-active-blocks-fro: Xannibaadaha firfircoon ee dhammaan wiki-yada: $1 ($2 ee wiki-kan)
checkuser-userinfocard-menu-add-to-watch: Ku dar {{GENDER:$1|bogga isticmaalaha}} liiska la daawado
checkuser-userinfocard-menu-remove-from-: Ka saar {{GENDER:$1|bogga isticmaalaha}} liiska la socodka
checkuser-userinfocard-menu-provide-feed: Ka bixi jawaab celin ku saabsan sifadan
checkuser-userinfocard-error-no-data: Lama heli karo macluumaadka isticmaalahan. Fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
checkuser-userinfocard-error-generic: Wax baa khaldamay. Fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
checkuser-userinfocard-enable-preference: Ku muuji badhan agta magaca isticmaalaha si loo furo popover leh macluumaad ku saabsan akoonka.
checkuser-userinfocard-activity-chart-la: Dhaqdhaqaaqa wax ka beddelka 60-kii maalmood ee ugu dambeeyay ({{PLURAL:$1|$1 wax ka beddel|$1 wax ka beddello|0=Ma jiro wax ka beddel}})
checkuser-ipinfo-global-contributions-to: Tirada wax ka beddelka iskutallaabta wiki ee laga sameeyay cinwaankan IP.
checkuser-ipinfo-global-contributions-va: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 wax ka beddel caalami ah|$1 wax ka beddello caalami ah|0=Ma jiro wax ka beddel caalami ah}}
tooltip-t-global-contributions: Liis ka kooban wax-ku darsiyada dhammaan wiki-yada ee {{GENDER:$1|isticmaalahani}}
checkuser-userinfocard-chart-tooltip-lab: $1 ({{PLURAL:$2|$2 wax ka beddel|$2 wax ka beddelo|0=Wax ka-beddel ma jiro}})
checkuser-userinfocard-temporary-account: Wuxuu oggolaaday inuu arko IP-yada akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-userinfocard-ip-revealed-count: IP-yada la muujiyay: $1 (ugu dambeyn la hubiyay $2)
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-autocl: Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo xiray maadaama dhammaan xisaabaadka la xannibay ama la qufulay
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-detail: Kiis lama helin oo leh aqoonsiga URL "$1".
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-subpag: Bog hoosaadka la bixiyay ma jiro.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-summar: Boggan waxa uu ka kooban yahay xisaabaad si otomaatig ah loogu calaamadeeyay inay suurtagal tahay inay shaki leeyihiin si ay u baaraan isticmaalayaasha CheckUser.
Boggan waxa uu ka kooban yahay xog faahfaahsan oo kaliya loogu talagalay CheckUser, kuna saabsan '''kiiska #$1'''.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-privat: Xogtan waxaa loogu talagalay oo keliya isticmaalayaasha leh gelitaanka CheckUser. Ha la wadaagin tirada kiisaska ama macluumaadka ku saabsan noocyada calaamadaha isticmaalayaasha aan CheckUser ahayn.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-filter: Shaandhaynta aad isticmaashay waa mid aad u ballaaran, fadlan yaree ama cidhiidhi geli raadintaada si aad u hesho natiijooyin ka wanaagsan.
Muuji kiisaska aanay jirin wax ka beddelo xisaabaad
Muuji kiisaska aanay jirin wax ka beddelo xisaabaad si caalami ah
Qari kiisaska aanay jirin xisaabo la xannibay
Muuji kiisaskii ugu dambeysay ee la cusboonaysiiyay
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-table-: Xisaabaadka si otomaatig ah loogu calaamadeeyay inay shaki leeyihiin
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-shared: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 tafatir|$1 tafatirro}} oo lagu sameeyay isla {{PLURAL:$2|bogga|$2 bog}}
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-revisi: $1 ka mid ah {{PLURAL:$2|$2 tafatir|$2 tafatirro}} {{PLURAL:$1|waa la celiyey}}
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-revert: $1 ka mid ah {{PLURAL:$2|$2 wax ku daris|$2 wax ku darisyo}} {{PLURAL:$1|dib loo celiyey}}
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-delete: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 wax ka beddel la tirtiray|$1 wax ka beddello la tirtiray}}
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-user-i: Isticmaalayaasha ka socda [[$1|baaritaan la soo jeediyay #$2]]
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-status: Dooro tan si aad u muujiso natiijooyin khaldan
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-change: Dooro xaalad cusub oo baaritaankan ah
Calaamadee haddii wax tallaabo ah la qaaday
Haddii aan wax qoraal ah lagu darin, erayada "{{int:checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-status-reason-default-invalid}}" ayaa la soo bandhigi doonaa
tusaale: tallaabo la qaaday: isticmaalayaal la xannibay
tusaale: kuwani ma aha xisaabaad shaki leh
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-risk-s: Calaamadahani waa tilmaamayaal muujinaya suurtagalnimada dhaqdhaqaaq fal fuliye xun.
Ka akhri macluumaad dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan calaamadaha khatarta ah gudaha popover
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-detail: {{PLURAL:$2|Wax ka beddel|Wax ka beddelo}} uu calaamadeeyay $1 ($2)
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-invali: Calaamadeynta kiiskan inuu yahay aan sax ahayn waxay ka dhigan tahay in aan kiisyo kale loo abuuri doonin akoonkaan.
checkuser-userinfocard-temporary-account: Xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee ka yimid dhammaan IP-yada la xiriira: $1
Tirinta guud ee dhammaan xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee ka yimid dhammaan IP-yada la xiriira xisaabtan
checkuser-contributions-temporary-accoun: Eeg dhammaan wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadkan
Qari wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee la xiriira
Xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee ka yimid dhammaan IP-yada la xiriira: $1.
Xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee IP-kan: $1.
Xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee IP-kan: $1 (xanniban: $2).
Liiska xisaabaadka waxaa lagu nuqulay sabuuradda
Ku guuldareystay in la nuqulo liiska xisaabaadka
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-check: Xannib dhammaan xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee la xiriira
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-accou: $1 Akoon ku meelgaar ah {{PLURAL:$1|la aqoonsaday|ayaa la aqoonsaday}} oo {{PLURAL:$2|isticmaalay $2 Cinwaanka IP |isticmaalay $2 Cinwaanada IP}} la xiriira $3 $4 maalmood ee u dambeeyay: $5.
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-contr: [{{fullurl:Special:Contributions/$1|showRelatedTemporaryAccounts=1}} Eeg dhammaan wax ku darsiyada xisaabaadkan]
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-accou: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in la aqoonsado xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee adeegsaday ciwaannada IP ee la xiriira $1. {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} sii wadi kartaa xannibaadda $1, ama isku day inaad mar kale raadiso si aad u aqoonsato xisaabaadka la xiriira.
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-confi: Tani waxay xannibaadda ku dabaqi doontaa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xisaab|xisaabo}}. Haddii aad sii waddo xannibaadda {{PLURAL:$1|xisaabtan|xisaabaadkan}}, waxaad xaqiijinaysaa inaad baaritaan ku samaysay {{PLURAL:$1|iyada|iyaga}}.
checkuser-related-tas-specialblock-limit: Waxaa jira xisaabaad ku-meelgaar ah oo aad u badan oo lagu darayo xannibaaddan. Waxaan kaliya oggol nahay in la xannibo ilaa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xisaab|xisaabo}} hal mar.
rangecalculator-summary: Qalabkani wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad xisaabiso baaxadda guud ee u dhexeysa liiska cinwaanada IP-ga. Qalabkani hadda wuxuu xisaabiyaa hal baaxad guud oo keliya, mana isku dari kartid cinwaanada IPv4 iyo IPv6.
